last_commit: fb1a04a Complete: Add runner smoke test note

current_task.title: Add branch safety guard to LangGraph runner docs/state handling
current_task.description: Update runner/langgraph/README.md to explicitly state that generated tasks must never use branch main directly. Add a note that task branches should use feature/<task-id> and AUTO_APPLY_SQL should stay false until SQL parsing is verified. Do not modify app code.

worker_result.output:
---

**Summary**

- **Files Created:** (none)
- **Files Modified:**
  - `runner/langgraph/README.md` — added "Branch Safety" section after Architecture, added branch safety blockquote note in `tasks.json Queue` section, updated `AUTO_APPLY_SQL` env var description to warn it should stay `false` until SQL parsing is verified
- **Check Result:** pass
- **Commit Result:** `9976b25` (feature commit); `62d4678` (fast-forward merge on main)
- **Push Result:** done (main pushed to origin)
- **SQL Required:** no
- **SQL File Path:** N/A
- **Known Limitations:**
  - `deploy` remote is not configured — Vercel deploy step skipped (not a blocker, same as prior runs)
- **Next Task:** Add a runtime guard in `generate_worker_prompt` or `load_next_task` that raises an error if `task["branch"]` equals `"main"`, enforcing the branch safety rule at execution time rather than only in docs
